since_last: 49% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.60%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.50% · BTC -0.34% · Gold +0.79% · Nasdaq100 +0.64%. 49% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.60%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.60%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.16%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at +29.88%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +29.88% at $209.04
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +29.88% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
